verdict.answer_first: A and B both answer immediately: A says 'HTTPS is just HTTP running inside a TLS tunnel'; B says the same, then names the three guarantees.
verdict.decisiveness: B is slightly more decisive because it explains and closes cleanly; A adds 'Want me to go deeper...' after already answering, which is harmless but less final.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because the 'mental model' compresses the mechanism into usable parts: 'Certificates answer... Diffie-Hellman answers... AEAD cipher answers...'
